privileged_info_summary: The docker_hardening_readonly task is a Docker security hardening exercise using a synthetic Python application. The acme-ingest container is configured to write to three critical paths: /run/acme (PID file), /var/lib/acme/cache (cache directory), and /var/log/acme (log file). The health endpoint is accessible at http://localhost:8080/health. The task succeeds at 75 points or higher. All specified paths, container names, and configuration values are correct as implemented in the dynamically generated application code.
